title: NADE State Chapter Contacts (Regional Directors)
description: Contact directory for NADE's four Regional Directors, organized by region (Midwest, North, Pacific, South). Each entry lists the Regional Director's name, phone number, and @ssa.gov email: Patricia Chaplin (Midwest), Michelle Wade (North), Amber Barnes (Pacific), and Ebony Grissett (South). Serves as the top-level routing contact list for state/local chapter inquiries. Scraped from the official NADE site.
notes: Authoritative: direct capture of NADE's State Chapter Contacts page (source URL preserved). Lists only the four Regional Directors (name/phone/email), not individual state chapter contacts despite the page title. RD assignments here (Chaplin=Midwest, Wade=North, Barnes=Pacific, Grissett=South) align with the region-chapter-numbers directory but differ from the Board of Directors roster snapshot. Contains personal contact details. No date stated; temporal_coverage omitted.
